attributes.action: I feel its time the tax brackets on earnings need to changed
attributes.additional_details: Review and change tax brackets to suit modern times and modern wages.give people the money they earn and not penalise them for having better paying jobs or working more hours to help support their families or pay bills.Energy bills are high,mortgages are high,fuel for vehicles are high and people are left struggling to live and feed their families
attributes.background: Look at changing the current tax brackets,people are being punished for having better paid jobs,people are trying to get better paid jobs to help them selves live a better life but once you earn over £50000 your losing 40%tax,

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for a similar ask: 
End the freeze on income tax thresholds & adjust annually, indexed to inflation https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/749467
